problem: Control-plane consolidation ~95% complete. Auto-review, auto-ship (PR #51), and lifecycle auto-advance (PR #52) all shipped. Remaining: memory observations not deeply used in context composition.
globalDecisions: Work Order + Lane + Delivery Run is the canonical lifecycle source of truth
Old phase becomes a derived compatibility view, auto-synced from work order status
Profile automation hooks (autoReview, autoShip, autoPlan) drive automatic transitions
Patrol owns recovery, retry, and escalation for stuck lifecycle stages

candidateFeatures.userOutcome: Phase truth is always consistent with work order status. No manual phase-set needed. Patrol detects and remediates phase divergence.
candidateFeatures.scopeSummary: Shipped in PR #52. Phase auto-advances from work_order_sync for active states. Patrol phase_status_divergence finding. Manual phase-set deprecated.
candidateFeatures.readinessReason: Shipped in PR #52 on feature/ship-assistant. 112 tests passing.
candidateFeatures.handoffSummary: Shipped. work_order.py: auto-advance in sync_work_order(). watch.py: phase_status_divergence finding. storage.py/phases.py: quiet parameter for auto-sync.

candidateFeatures.userOutcome: When profile allows, review starts automatically after review-readiness, and ship starts automatically after review passes. Manual gates preserved for profiles that require them.
candidateFeatures.scopeSummary: Shipped in PR #51. Auto-review and auto-ship in dispatcher tick, profile policy in work order automation state, post-ship cleanup patrol finding.
candidateFeatures.readinessReason: Shipped in PR #51 on feature/ship-assistant. 112 tests passing.
candidateFeatures.handoffSummary: Shipped. dispatcher.py: _attempt_auto_review(), _attempt_auto_ship(). work_order.py: profilePolicy in automation state. watch.py: post_ship_cleanup finding.

candidateFeatures.userOutcome: prime() produces rich, feature-aware context summaries that include active observations, resolved contradictions, and lane status. Context is useful for implementation decisions, not just task tracking.
candidateFeatures.scopeSummary: Enhance prime() to compose context from work order state + observations + contradictions + cards. Add --feature flag to prime CLI. Improve observation sourcing with artifact path links.
risks: Richer context increases token consumption in prime() output
candidateFeatures.handoffSummary: Enhance context.py prime() to render cards and observations into feature-aware markdown sections. Add --feature flag to prime CLI. Improve observation sourcing (link to artifact paths). Use existing explicit/derived confidence levels to weight context output.

decisionLog.title: Phase auto-advance is a side-effect of work_order_sync
decisionLog.decision: Phase auto-advance is a side-effect of work_order_sync, not a separate patrol job
decisionLog.rationale: Keeps phase truth consistent on every sync instead of waiting for patrol tick

decisionLog.title: review-ship-automation shipped in PR #51
decisionLog.decision: review-ship-automation shipped as part of PR #51 consolidation
decisionLog.rationale: All building blocks existed — only wiring was needed
